config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.after.CustID}) MERGE (ct:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.after.CategoryID }) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ct) ON CREATE SET r.SportGroupID = event.after.SportGroupID,r.Remark = event.after.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate ,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy, r.LastModifiedDate = event.after.LastModifiedDate, r.LastModifiedBy = event.after.LastModifiedBy, r.LastScannedDate = event.after.LastScannedDate RETURN COUNT(*)', event.op = 'u','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.before.CustID})-[oldR:HAS_CATEGORY]->(:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.before.CategoryID}) DELETE oldR WITH event MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.after.CustID}) MERGE (ct:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.after.CategoryID }) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ct) ON CREATE SET r.SportGroupID = event.after.SportGroupID, r.Remark = event.after.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,  r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy, r.LastModifiedDate = event.after.LastModifiedDate, r.LastModifiedBy = event.after.LastModifiedBy, r.LastScannedDate = event.after.LastScannedDate RETURN COUNT(*)', event.op = 'd','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.before.CustID})-[oldR:HAS_CATEGORY]->(:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.before.CategoryID}) DELETE oldR RETURN COUNT(*)'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
